title: mcpbin _meta envelope
description: Fixed schema for the _meta object that is the final text content block of every mcpbin tool result (FR-013).

tool.description: Name of the tool that was called.

received.description: Exact raw parsed arguments received from the client, even if the tool ignores them. {} for no-arg tools.

note.description: One human-readable sentence explaining why the response looks the way it does; references an MCP spec section where relevant.
